texto: When you consider time and change, you realize that a people does not originate when individuals merge into a bigger thing. Instead, a people arises when many actions and movements combine into novel patterns of change. For a people is always in the making or unmaking.
explicacao: Citação de Paulina Ochoa Espejo sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “When you consider time and change, you realize that a people does not originate when individuals …” articula tempo, democracy, philosophy em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e philosophy.
